description: A terminal window is open in the Muncie HEC-RAS project directory containing simulation results in an HDF5 file. Using the Python analysis scripts in ~/Documents/analysis_scripts/, extract the peak water surface elevation (WSE) data from the simulation results. The analysis must include the overall peak WSE, mean peak WSE across all computational cells, and per-cell peak values. Save the output as a CSV file in ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/.
